name: google-ads-mcp
description: A Python MCP server for Google Ads API integration with OAuth 2.0 authentication
long_description: Comprehensive Google Ads management via MCP. Connect Claude to your Google Ads accounts for campaign analytics, keyword research, search terms analysis, budget reporting, geographic and device breakdowns, conversion tracking, and ad asset performance — all via natural language. Supports single-user local mode and multi-user team deployments on Google Cloud Run.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all accessible Google Ads accounts including nested MCC sub-accounts

tools.name: run_gaql
tools.description: Execute a raw Google Ads Query Language (GAQL) query

tools.name: run_keyword_planner
tools.description: Generate keyword ideas with search volume and competition metrics

tools.name: get_campaign_performance
tools.description: Get impressions, clicks, cost, CTR, CPC, and conversions by campaign

tools.name: get_ad_group_performance
tools.description: Get performance metrics broken down by ad group

tools.name: get_ad_performance
tools.description: Get performance metrics for individual ads/creatives

tools.name: get_keyword_performance
tools.description: Get keyword metrics including quality scores and search impression share

tools.name: get_search_terms_report
tools.description: See the actual searches that triggered your ads

tools.name: get_budget_report
tools.description: View campaign budgets and month-to-date spend

tools.name: get_geographic_performance
tools.description: Performance breakdown by country and location type

tools.name: get_device_performance
tools.description: Performance split by device: mobile, desktop, tablet

tools.name: get_conversion_actions
tools.description: List all conversion actions configured on the account

tools.name: get_asset_performance
tools.description: Responsive search ad asset performance with Google's performance labels

resources.name: gaql://reference
resources.description: Google Ads Query Language (GAQL) reference documentation and examples

google_ads_developer_token.title: Google Ads Developer Token
google_ads_developer_token.description: Your Google Ads API Developer Token (obtain from Google Ads Console → Tools & Settings → API Center)

oauth_config_path.title: OAuth Config Path
oauth_config_path.description: Full path to your client_secret.json file downloaded from Google Cloud Console

gcp_project_id.title: GCP Project ID
gcp_project_id.description: Your Google Cloud project ID (used for Firestore token storage in team mode)
